text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Wow... What a snowstorm...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(I'm lucky to have found a shop so close... I'd hate
for this antique book to get wet.)

text_block_list.name: Server
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but we're quite full at the moment... Would
you mind sharing a table?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, that works with me!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wait, is that you, Cafe? I didn't expect to be
seated next to you!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh... Yes...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um... I'm sorry if I'm bothering you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That book seems... to be quite old.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Do you mean this book? H-how did you
know it was on me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My friend is speaking with the one who lives in its
pages. They are... happy to have found a new
reader... after so long.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ah... I see... Your book... it's about coffee.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes. This is about the history of coffee cherry
tea.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It seems that it was considered an elixir by many
great heroes in the past! Hehe, so I just had to
learn more!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Coincidentally... this drink... happens to be coffee
cherry tea. Would you... like a taste?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Is that right?! Oh, well, I'll have to order the
same.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The taste is a little... unique. So maybe... you
should start with... a sip.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Blow... So this is coffee cherry tea!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What... do you think?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It is... unique, but I don't hate it. I think with a few
more sips, I'll come to like the taste, maybe...
One cup of coffee cherry tea, please!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I wonder if the heroes of the past drank
this on cold days?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Should I... ask the one who lives in your book?
